title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 15–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Brook, Brûlée, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Chop- Brook! Per!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Brook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Chop- per!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Wait! Isn't that your ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yeah. It's been damaged!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like they got to it before you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: OH NO... my brothers are there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: against the soldiers, aren't we, skeleton?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whereze I am the one and only

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: nda

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whereze

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Soul King, After All!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haa- HAA- there's no end to these guys; they're proba- buy going to keep coming out of the mirrors!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: It's the mirror in Nami's room...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll probably get mad if we smash it, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just smash it if you can.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We'll apologize later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Apologize to whom? Perorin.)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You saw that bolt of lightning earlier, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No one's coming back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This question- and-answer game is boring me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm tired of playing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just get off!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The sunny is our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry! I can see the coast on the other side of the trees!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're Saved! Is pudding really on our side?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't tell! At any rate, we can't let our guard down till we're out of big mom's territory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oi! Zets! What's the big idea?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry! I didn't mean to! I couldn't control myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But seri-ously, those thundercloud eggs were so yummy®

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wedding...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll be fine, right?! We don't have time to turn back, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't need to worry about those guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're the ones without a moment to lose!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Time to make a cake

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: That'll make big mom faint!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pride of these chefs is at stake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be the one... to take all this trash back to where they belong!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
